name: tech-ai-news
description: 极简科技AI资讯网站 - 专注科技、AI大模型、算力、开发工具行业新闻

scripts.install:all: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../admin && npm run build
